commands.review_summary:
The PR changes auto-reply failure handling so classified rate-limit and overload runner failures in Discord group/channel contexts bypass non-direct suppression and are marked `isError`, with focused Vitest coverage.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +32. Total +33 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main has a mocked Discord group/channel 429 path that resolves to `SILENT_REPLY_TOKEN`, and the suppression flag explains that behavior. No live Discord reproduction was provided.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated code repair is needed; maintainers need to decide whether to accept the default Discord group/channel visibility change and require real proof or override it.

target.title: fix(auto-reply): surface fatal channel errors
target.body:
## Summary

- Surface classified rate-limit and overload runner failures in Discord group/channel chats instead of routing them to `NO_REPLY`.
- Keep generic runner failure boilerplate silent in non-direct chats unless the existing silent-reply policy explicitly disallows silence.
- Mark non-silent agent-run failure payloads as `isError` so downstream delivery sees them as error notices.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts`
  - Result: passed, 157 tests.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
  - Result: clean.
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`
  - Result: passed.
  - Provider: Blacksmith Testbox through Crabbox.
  - Testbox: `tbx_01kt61g0cgn5j9tp2375c47feq`.
  - Actions run: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26866967417.
  - Summary: `command=2m47.31s total=2m56.74s exit=0`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: fatal channel-visible rate-limit/overload failures are no longer suppressed to `NO_REPLY` in Discord group/channel contexts, while generic runner failures remain silent by default.

Real environment tested: Blacksmith Testbox through Crabbox using the OpenClaw changed-check lane, plus focused local Vitest through the repo node wrapper.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts`; `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.

Evidence after fix: regression tests assert Discord group/channel rate-limit and overloaded failures produce non-`NO_REPLY` `isError` payloads, and the changed gate passed on Testbox `tbx_01kt61g0cgn5j9tp2375c47feq`.

Observed result after fix: classified transient failure copy is visible in Discord group/channel tests; generic raw runner failure copy still resolves to `NO_REPLY` under default silent-reply policy.

What was not tested: a live Discord roundtrip with a real provider outage was not run; the behavior was validated with focused regression tests and the remote changed gate.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
